heading: Tallafa wa BicycleRepairStations.com
heroText: Wannan manhaja kyauta ce, tana da tallace-tallace, kuma buɗaɗɗen tushe ce. Gudummawa tana taimakawa biyan kuɗin masauki, taswira, da haɓakawa.
customAmount: Ko shigar da adadin kuɗin ku
stripeNotice: Ana sarrafa biyan kuɗi cikin aminci ta Stripe a cikin USD.
infoDev: Ci gaba da haɓakawa da kulawa
successMessage: Gudummawar ku mai karimci tana taimakawa wajen kiyaye BicycleRepairStations.com kyauta ga masu hawan keke a ko'ina.
